mapper.insert:
insert into resume_picture (url, resume_id, create_time, user_id, status, update_time) VALUE
(#{pt.url},#{pt.resumeId},#{pt.createTime},#{pt.userId},#{pt.status},#{pt.updateTime})
mapper.update: update resume_picture set status = 0, update_time = now() where resume_id = #{resumeId} and status = 1
